chart.def: 圖表、航圖、排行榜、繪製、製圖的人的人物、製圖地 (圖)
chart.col: pie chart, flow chart, astronomical chart, top of the charts
chart.ex: The latest album reached the very top of the pop charts.

charter.def: 憲章、特許狀、包租(機、船)、租用、特許、特許的人的人物、包租地 (憲)
charter.col: un charter, charter flight, royal charter
charter.ex: The company decided to charter a private jet for the CEO.

chartered.def: 受特許的、領有執照的、包租的人的人 (或物) (證)
chartered.ex: You need to hire a professional chartered accountant today.

charting.def: 繪圖、製圖、記錄的人 (或物) (圖)
charting.ex: The scientists are working on the detailed ocean charting.

chartism.ex: Chartism was a working-class movement for political reform.

chartist.def: 憲章運動者、股市分析者、製圖員人物 (單數)
chartist.ex: The market chartist predicted a sudden fall in gold prices.

chary.def: 謹慎的、吝嗇的、謹慎地 (慎)
chary.ex: She is always very chary of meeting complete strangers.

chase.def: 追趕、追捕、追求、雕鏤、追蹤地 (追)
chase.col: police chase, give chase, cut to the chase (開門見山)
chase.ex: The police began to chase the stolen car through the city.

chaser.def: 追趕者、(酒後)淡飲料、雕刻工的人物 (單數)
chaser.ex: He ordered a strong whiskey and a cool water chaser.

chasm.def: 深淵、裂口、巨大分歧的人物 (單數)
chasm.ex: The earthquake caused a massive chasm to open in the ground.

chasseur.def: 獵兵、身著制服的侍者人物 (單數)
chasseur.ex: A French chasseur was standing at the entrance to the club.

chassis.def: (車)底盤、架子、框架的人物 (單數/複數同形) (單數)
chassis.ex: The mechanic checked the steel chassis of the old vehicle.

chaste.def: 貞潔的、純潔的、樸素的人的人物 (貞)
chaste.ex: He gave his young daughter a gentle and chaste kiss.

chastely.ex: The young monk decided to live chastely for three years.

chasten.def: 懲罰、磨練、抑制、懲罰的人的人、懲罰地 (懲)
chasten.ex: The defeat helped to chasten the team's over-confident pride.

chastened.def: 受到教訓的、磨練的人的人 (或物) (懲)
chastened.ex: He returned from the meeting in a quiet and chastened mood.

chastise.def: 嚴懲、責罵、懲罰的人的人、懲罰地 (懲)
chastise.ex: The manager decided to chastise the staff for their laziness.

chastisement.ex: The report condemned the use of corporal chastisement.

chastity.def: 貞潔、純潔、簡樸的人的人物 (單數)
chastity.ex: She took a lifelong vow of poverty, obedience, and chastity.

chasuble.ex: The priest wore a heavy silk chasuble for the Easter mass.
